rows.label: tev020401_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire

rows.label: tev020401_SEL0011
rows.name:
Ask Anna about data probe
installation sites.

rows.label: tev020401_JNK0020
rows.name: Discuss

rows.label: tev020401_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask Anna if anything is troubling her.

rows.label: tev020401_SEL0031
rows.name: Ask Anna why NLA is only half-built.

rows.label: tev020401_SEL0041
rows.name: Ask Anna about the construction of NLA.

rows.label: tev020401_SEL1021
rows.name: Ask Anna about recent developments.

rows.label: tev020401_SEL1041
rows.name: Ask Anna about recent developments.

rows.label: tev020401_MSG0001
rows.name:
Oh? Are you a new recruit as well? I
just finished up with my training, too.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020401_MSG0002
rows.name:
For our training, we left through this
gate and surveyed western Primordial
Wilderness, but it looks like yours is...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020401_MSG0003
rows.name:
Oh wow! Yours is in the complete opposite direction!
Yeah, you'll get there a lot faster by leaving
through the gate in the administrative district.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020401_MSG0004
rows.name:
Be careful out there. You never know
what sorts of indigens you'll run into.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020401_MSG0005
rows.name:
And if you DO run into trouble, escape by sprinting to
safety. I mean, how lame would it be to get yourself
killed while you're still in training? Em-BARR-assing![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020401_MSG0008
rows.name:
I'm searching for a Pathfinder team to join,
but I can't decide which one. I feel like I've
been agonizing over this decision forever![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020401_MSG0009
rows.name:
I mean, the responsibilities of BLADE are too much
for a single new recruit. Plus, going on long missions
without anyone to talk to would drive me crazy![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020401_MSG0010
rows.name:
So I've been checking out the
various options. Robert's team
is looking pretty good...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020401_MSG0011
rows.name:
As team captain, Robert seems like he's
well-prepared and a good planner. I feel
like I'd be safe putting my life in his hands.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020401_MSG0012
rows.name:
Also, he seems nice and clean, which
is important. I want someone who lets
me bathe during mission downtimes.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020401_MSG0020
rows.name:
...What? Do you have
amnesia or something?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020401_MSG0021
rows.name:
Well, the Habitat—as this residential unit
was known— was built after we fled Earth,
WHILE the White Whale was in flight.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020401_MSG0022
rows.name:
But then the stupid xenoform attack
forced us to make a crash landing.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020401_MSG0023
rows.name:
The still-unfinished Habitat unit ended
up coming down right here on Mira.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020401_MSG0024
rows.name:
Now that we no longer have access to the
Whale's construction unit, we'll have to
finish the job with human manpower.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020401_MSG0025
rows.name:
So let's work hard and
get the job done right![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020401_MSG0040
rows.name:
It's pretty incredible that after sustaining
an attack of that severity, none of the
buildings in NLA seem to be heavily damaged.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020401_MSG0041
rows.name:
From the looks of the city,
you'd never guess that we'd been
attacked in the first place![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020401_MSG0042
rows.name:
I was kind of curious, so I asked
Ciska about it. She knows everything
about everything, you know?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020401_MSG0043
rows.name:
She said that NLA was designed to
look like a classic American town.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020401_MSG0044
rows.name:
Also, the buildings are made out of steel and
coated with an earthquake-resistant resin that
can even withstand the impact of artillery shells![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020401_MSG0045
rows.name:
THAT'S what I call the last stronghold
of humanity! This place can even
keep us safe from the Growth.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020401_MSG1046
rows.name:
Ahhhh... Nothing beats taking a nice
long bath to unwind and relax.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020401_MSG1047
rows.name:
It was nice of Robert to be so
patient with me. I'll keep working
hard on the next mission![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020401_MSG1048
rows.name:
Aren't baths the greatest? I don't care what
corner of the galaxy humanity will have to flee
to next— as long as they have baths, I'm set![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020401_MSG1049
rows.name:
I actually suggested to Kan'tonam
that he start bathing.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020401_MSG1050
rows.name:
But he said it would make his
skin swell up. I guess all
Orpheans must be that way?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020401_MSG1051
rows.name:
None of them will ever know
the joys of a good bath. Those
poor, poor bastards...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020401_MSG1060
rows.name:
I am now the chairperson of the
NLA Hot Springs Association![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020401_MSG1061
rows.name:
So far the only other member is
Ciska, who shares my love of long
baths and natural spring spas.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020401_MSG1062
rows.name:
But I swear that we will accomplish our secret plan
of one day building a public hot springs in NLA. I
hope we can count on your behind-the-scenes support![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020401_MSG1063
rows.name:
Our motto is "Springs before Other Things."
For NLA will never be complete so long as
it lacks a decent hot springs spa![ST:wait ]
